Dear Peter,
Today I joined Harris Faulkner on Fox News to discuss the impeachment trial.

_**What we are watching is a total kangaroo court that is unconstitutional.**_

Chuck Schumer and his liberals are trying to impeach Donald Trump _**as a private citizen!**_

If you missed it, check out my interview by clicking on the image below.

[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=178cdae8ff4142368795e741de9500e2&_e=v0XlWzV9iorc42OLhGRnV3yE_mmvQWjoKD416ESIVUhoGKgSlz3RprLkIN7NTcaR2mNIJJpp5hczrxnuIY7ED_ykPVDl_tim0Va5QKyw2vJvDS2_6nC8q2oJFGgY9UAhBM6L1MXEwWj6BlPgNP1CBvcCIetSVGZmmfZD0Ou-X4tLVhWS_p4fjHbNeYuhWtpUhZEbKTQNYHaB1Nmw215X-A-GfRDJdf9KGuXavOeF9_vQTw-p6d5tvo9xngj8AV765w7KAc9O3WBf9JMx5-ObxDBEJgFSseWbSCyNtecwePxZbYdA8TVSysp3tKHRwX46wfrGiXst6rgUfai-StTcjKDa1kDMc8KfzGDxeMGwVBhE0khXaN_rQr7Z2u0MCAtPJcyMP3sZOlh5R0VuIepBeIfVgYIQu85upYW_ADMf5lY%3D)
|
---

**Democrats are acting purely out of spite and a vengeance for the former president.** They set out to impeach Trump last year and failed. Now, they are going to fail again. But they still put on a political circus in the Senate, throwing away taxpayer dollars, while Americans are out of work and schools are closed, all while _**they are supposed to be working for us!**_
[_**Tell the Dems to get back to work! >>>**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=178cdae8ff4142368795e741de9500e2&_e=v0XlWzV9iorc42OLhGRnV3yE_mmvQWjoKD416ESIVUhoGKgSlz3RprLkIN7NTcaR2mNIJJpp5hczrxnuIY7ED_ykPVDl_tim0Va5QKyw2vJvDS2_6nC8q2oJFGgY9UAhBM6L1MXEwWj6BlPgNP1CBvcCIetSVGZmmfZD0Ou-X4tLVhWS_p4fjHbNeYuhWtpUhZEbKTQNYHaB1Nmw215X-IqLVcfvd4YqAjGFEYmpBiSBjDOJbqRdm2q5WsDTRvAJtAb74MqfjW8aaF_avJ_5_TGnTnqM2kfbEp3X6934T2mF20fc-qQqHfKWbzRtK88DjIviVFZ9VGAWKSIJb5K5XI_fq3GjSjbRYz3ItllKoDcpLa-Q4kmEOVFayuovVsoHqrtwS6Ugp3MjdW0gWCbf2cyZwTOjj0DHBP5LpbyEz28%3D)
The Senate floor is run in total chaos and pandemonium. Democrats should be focusing on getting Americans back to work and opening our schools for our children! _**Not dividing our nation.**_

_**Please consider a donation below and join me to send this message to Senate Democrats today.**_

name: Ro Khanna
subject: A few findings from our recent survey:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
Thank you to everyone who took our priorities survey this past week. I am grateful that so many of you took the time to share your priorities and I am invigorated to take your fights to the frontlines of Congress.
#
Thank you to those of you who took my recent priorities survey. I am so grateful that so many folks took time out of their day to share their priorities with me and my team.
We learned so much about our supporters after reviewing the results. But one thing became very clear after reading through them: **Our current systems are not working for working families.**
**I want to promise you that I am doing all I can to change that.[If you would like to support my work to bring your fights to the frontlines of Congress, please chip in what you can today to help support our movement.](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5431?refcode=ema-1633&t=1&akid=1633%2E946728%2ElOlQLR)**
Beyond this unsurprising – but disheartening – fact, I also learned much more about the specific issues that are important to you. I love diving into data, so please indulge me as I share a few statistics that really stood out to me:
* **88% of our survey takers listed “Addressing Climate Change” as one of the top issues they want me to fight for.** I know we need to safeguard our environment for the new century – which is why I proudly support a Green New Deal.

* Just behind climate change, **87% of our supporters shared the need for COVID-19 financial relief.** The American people have waited too long for relief. I have and will continue to fight for $2,000 relief checks.

* Tied for third, **72% of supporters voiced their strong support for Medicare for All and expanding Social Security and Medicare.** I have co-sponsored legislation to allow anyone 65+ to buy into Medicare, and have been a fierce advocate for Medicare for All.

Reading through all your responses and the passionate support for so many of these important issues reminded me why I’m in this fight. As I said earlier, I will not rest until we get our country back on the right track and working for all Americans.
_Are you with me?_
**[If you can, please consider showing your support for these frontline fights by making a donation today.](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5431?refcode=ema-1633&t=2&akid=1633%2E946728%2ElOlQLR)**
**[Contribute](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5431?refcode=em-1633&amounts=&t=21&akid=1633%2E946728%2ElOlQLR)**
Thank you,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-khanna?refcode=emfooter20210212&t=22&refcode2=1633_946728_lOlQLR&akid=1633%2E946728%2ElOlQLR)** | [](https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
---|---|---
Paid for by Ro for Congress
PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto:info@rokhanna.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we stay in touch with you, but if you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=1633%2E946728%2ElOlQLR).

subject: BREAKING - Cuomo aide admits they hid nursing home data
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cb9debc1e267/breaking-cuomo-aide-admits-they-hid-nursing-home-data?e=9f843ba602)
---
| |
---
| **_STATEMENT FROM SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT_** The news today that Governor Cuomo’s top aide admitted to deliberately withholding information about COVID-19 deaths is the latest in a string of disturbing acts of corruption by his administration. This is clearly a gross obstruction of justice. Instead of apologizing or providing answers to the thousands of New York families who lost loved ones, the Governor’s administration made apologies to politicians behind closed doors for the “political inconvenience” this scandal has caused them. There is no need to deny what everyone in Albany and around New York State already knows: Governor Cuomo controls every aspect of his administration with an obsessive attention to detail. I am again calling that Governor Cuomo and his administration be investigated from top to bottom and that he be stripped of his emergency powers. Justice needs to be brought for the grieving families who have been ignored to protect Governor Cuomo and his Democrat allies in the Legislature. If the Governor is involved, he should be immediately removed from office.

body:
STAND UP to hold the liberals accountable! No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-mfdkyk-ahkdjtlkr-k/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mfdkyk-ahkdjtlkr-r/) PeterStanding up to **bad ideas** from the Democrats is going to be a **full-time job in Congress! **I got a taste of that late last night, in the House Small Business Committee that I am a member of. **Democrats are trying to more than double the minimum wage.**It sounds so simple: free money from the liberals! But any business owner knows that if they're forced to double paychecks for the same amount of work (without additional money coming in), it means fewer jobs overall, and cutbacks or fewer hours. **That's not good for working people, despite the liberals' promises. **That's why I introduced a common-sense amendment to do just one thing: **ask just how many jobs would be lost because of this change.** [Join Fitzgerald - Fight the LIberals' Empty Promises](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mfdkyk-ahkdjtlkr-y/) Of course, the Democrats don't really want to know the answer to that question, so they voted it down. But I was still proud to do **exactly what I promised I would do: **fight for the people I represent, and stand up against bad ideas from the radical left in Congress.As we move forward in the next two years, there are going to be a lot more battles just like this one.I know where I stand. [I hope you're willing to stand with me.](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mfdkyk-ahkdjtlkr-j/)-Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [Join Fitzgerald - Stand Up for Small Businesses](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mfdkyk-ahkdjtlkr-t/)

name: Mary Vought
subject: Time to Clean Out the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The U.S. Senate needs a good old fashioned house
cleaning. Chuck Schumer and the Democrats are power-hungry
liberals, and sadly, far too many Republicans lack the spine to
stand up to them.

That's why former Senator Jim DeMint founded the
SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND, and it's why our mission of electing
true conservatives to the U.S. Senate is needed more than ever.

Freedom-loving Americans have a BIG opportunity in
2022 to dramatically reshape the Senate. Here's why:

(1) Vulnerable Democrats are on the ballot in
Arizona, Georgia, and New Hampshire;

(2) Republican retirements have already created open
seats in Alabama, North Carolina, Ohio, and Pennsylvania; and

(3) A strong conservative could defeat Lisa
Murkowski in the Republican primary election in Alaska.

Please help us build a conservative Senate by
contributing $25, $50, $100, or more to SCF today!

Your support will help fight the establishment and
push back against the weak Republicans who refuse to stand up to
the Democrats.

You see, SCF is not controlled by the Republican
Party or any of its campaign committees. We get our funding from
grassroots conservatives who love America and want to elect
principled leaders who will keep their promises.

It's why we have invested over $1 million this year
to support conservative Senator Josh Hawley at a time when the
political establishment has sought to cancel him simply because
he raised questions about the integrity of the 2020 election.

And boy, has this made the liberals hot mad.

They wanted to make Josh Hawley toxic and strip him
of all support, but we've raised his profile with the grassroots
and boosted his fundraising to record levels!

Nothing infuriates liberal elites more than when
Americans support conservatives financially. When small-dollar
donations flood in, it neutralizes the establishment's power to
punish leaders like Josh Hawley who are fighting to represent us
in Washington.

Please join hundreds of thousands of patriots who
support the Senate Conservatives Fund by contributing today!

NOW IS THE TIME FOR ACTION. Conservatives must lock
arms and work together to promote and nominate the right
candidates. Now is the time to build a conservative Senate!

Thank you for considering this urgent request, and
thank you for doing so much to fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

DONATE HERE

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the

clean_body: Fellow Conservative: The U.S. Senate needs a good old fashioned house cleaning. Chuck Schumer and the Democrats are power-hungry liberals, and sadly, far too many Republicans lack the spine to stand up to them. That's why former Senator Jim DeMint founded the SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND, and it's why our mission of electing true conservatives to the U.S. Senate is needed more than ever. Freedom-loving Americans have a BIG opportunity in 2022 to dramatically reshape the Senate. Here's why: (1) Vulnerable Democrats are on the ballot in Arizona, Georgia, and New Hampshire; (2) Republican retirements have already created open seats in Alabama, North Carolina, Ohio, and Pennsylvania; and (3) A strong conservative could defeat Lisa Murkowski in the Republican primary election in Alaska. Please help us build a conservative Senate by contributing $25, $50, $100, or more to SCF today! Your support will help fight the establishment and push back against the weak Republicans who refuse to stand up to the Democrats. You see, SCF is not controlled by the Republican Party or any of its campaign committees. We get our funding from grassroots conservatives who love America and want to elect principled leaders who will keep their promises. It's why we have invested over $1 million this year to support conservative Senator Josh Hawley at a time when the political establishment has sought to cancel him simply because he raised questions about the integrity of the 2020 election. And boy, has this made the liberals hot mad. They wanted to make Josh Hawley toxic and strip him of all support, but we've raised his profile with the grassroots and boosted his fundraising to record levels! Nothing infuriates liberal elites more than when Americans support conservatives financially. When small-dollar donations flood in, it neutralizes the establishment's power to punish leaders like Josh Hawley who are fighting to represent us in Washington. Please join hundreds of thousands of patriots who support the Senate Conservatives Fund by contributing today! NOW IS THE TIME FOR ACTION. Conservatives must lock arms and work together to promote and nominate the right candidates. Now is the time to build a conservative Senate! Thank you for considering this urgent request, and thank you for doing so much to fight for America's future. Sincerely, Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003 DONATE HERE Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington. Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. | Hoosier Republican,

Have you heard about Joe Biden’s new immigration policy?

Within 24 hours of his swearing in, he signed his first Executive Order, which called for stopping border wall construction and calling on Congress to grant citizenship to up to one million people in our country illegally.

And that’s just the beginning, because his immigration policy goes far beyond just tearing down the improvements President Trump made while in office.

Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi are moving fast on a plan to extend FULL AMNESTY to the 11 million illegal immigrants in our country today!

**It is their ultimate power grab scheme**.

We knew this radical open-borders agenda was coming if the Democrats’ won complete control in Washington. Now, it’s here. We MUST fight back for the rule of law, and for those who follow it and come to our great country the right way.

Help us show where Hoosiers stand, Hoosier Republican.

[**Please, consider contributing right now so that Hoosier Republicans can fight back against this power grab >>>**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f205fc267a&e=1acd9bb3d6)

There are going to be numerous key battles on this front in the months to come. With every day, the Democratic Party is moving farther and farther left.

With your support we can lay the foundation to take back the House and Senate in 2022, and replace Joe Biden in 2024.

\- Team Indiana GOP

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013pQVNM-4SH8O7QDWtLhO_QE1prnE1gU29ms6Z6HiEj7O7NsjACoQ4OXUlXKQVkmjubyc-DoNCvfRqAH3AihOKQPAopd1ZeNkzkBsGe4zQKD-5xSr3Z-YOy4wiWHjFYSG0qavDzLl6_g=&c=dFf0z6y9dAEbiJRMoz3gGit49PwHvhZOzEHEs8mH1gEk3jfTI-6Pig==&ch=QLuyZ8tJbZXeb_xJMSHNlaONoACVW8jJ7qU6RaUP6iD2SEemR4t-mQ==).

name: Leslie Rutledge
subject: Recognizing our brave law enforcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rutledge for Governor
body:
I am honored to award our brave officers and to recognize the work and sacrifice they make daily.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L8w6mRZ4o44OGzQXsVdY7fsdTeN4WH9YaUkOwr3wOufHfuGURA03IW22CxUVYf_Ga8zbv9Ot2OOOaZQf8pK8mKIR57oCjXru4Ju-VSDVP0jUO6FrMGoB-i-flchQAHpNzylZYIK3oIyOWoFazj35uiu3i9jn8mfzU9L1cfNpl1f_rXtSErfNmzHtwPth5XE7KapyCXfhuVjESekEWc2EhLyuJgEyDILZlHehwzijxyyhrsnQ6jUTBNW9-shaf5oH2bu8jpJepmZPCwXLuKbK3DsCER7U8e-Kb8POltb8T-OM0JML8SvPuTnTHI2qvZb6s6e4TtWF1dw7jr2iVCdiBT__ArzIjVHp3nn4Rn_0OL54SMQMsCy9HAcUdFyfK67GL7wmfFH0DOQWnYE6ZoawN-X6ffiDg6wnD44_NwlV-NS48k8Q7_1kTw==&c=f_rrXLUNQnkG5Y1paEATsxpLNooSVSEPZ3MT5HcScbF82BYRDmuImw==&ch=kYrjAy3glk2a26RZ1xluR4G_FEwii4X3QoHcB86afIed2tmFEu2Q5Q==)
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L8w6mRZ4o44OGzQXsVdY7fsdTeN4WH9YaUkOwr3wOufHfuGURA03IW22CxUVYf_Ga8zbv9Ot2OOOaZQf8pK8mKIR57oCjXru4Ju-VSDVP0jUO6FrMGoB-i-flchQAHpNzylZYIK3oIyOWoFazj35uiu3i9jn8mfzU9L1cfNpl1f_rXtSErfNmzHtwPth5XE7KapyCXfhuVjESekEWc2EhLyuJgEyDILZlHehwzijxyyhrsnQ6jUTBNW9-shaf5oH2bu8jpJepmZPCwXLuKbK3DsCER7U8e-Kb8POltb8T-OM0JML8SvPuTnTHI2qvZb6s6e4TtWF1dw7jr2iVCdiBT__ArzIjVHp3nn4Rn_0OL54SMQMsCy9HAcUdFyfK67GL7wmfFH0DOQWnYE6ZoawN-X6ffiDg6wnD44_NwlV-NS48k8Q7_1kTw==&c=f_rrXLUNQnkG5Y1paEATsxpLNooSVSEPZ3MT5HcScbF82BYRDmuImw==&ch=kYrjAy3glk2a26RZ1xluR4G_FEwii4X3QoHcB86afIed2tmFEu2Q5Q==)
Friend,

**_I believe in Law and Order, and I believe in our brave police officers. _**

They uphold our laws and protect their communities and; far too often, they are berated by radical political activists and a hostile mainstream media.
**[SUPPORT LAW ENFORCEMENT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L8w6mRZ4o44OGzQXsVdY7fsdTeN4WH9YaUkOwr3wOufHfuGURA03IW22CxUVYf_Ga8zbv9Ot2OOOaZQf8pK8mKIR57oCjXru4Ju-VSDVP0jUO6FrMGoB-i-flchQAHpNzylZYIK3oIyOWoFazj35uiu3i9jn8mfzU9L1cfNpl1f_rXtSErfNmzHtwPth5XE7KapyCXfhuVjESekEWc2EhLyuJgEyDILZlHehwzijxyyhrsnQ6jUTBNW9-shaf5oH2bu8jpJepmZPCwXLuKbK3DsCER7U8e-Kb8POltb8T-OM0JML8SvPuTnTHI2qvZb6s6e4TtWF1dw7jr2iVCdiBT__ArzIjVHp3nn4Rn_0OL54SMQMsCy9HAcUdFyfK67GL7wmfFH0DOQWnYE6ZoawN-X6ffiDg6wnD44_NwlV-NS48k8Q7_1kTw==&c=f_rrXLUNQnkG5Y1paEATsxpLNooSVSEPZ3MT5HcScbF82BYRDmuImw==&ch=kYrjAy3glk2a26RZ1xluR4G_FEwii4X3QoHcB86afIed2tmFEu2Q5Q==)**
I am honored to award our brave officers and to recognize the work and sacrifice they make daily. We would be less safe without them.
**[SUPPORT LAW ENFORCEMENT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L8w6mRZ4o44OGzQXsVdY7fsdTeN4WH9YaUkOwr3wOufHfuGURA03IW22CxUVYf_Ga8zbv9Ot2OOOaZQf8pK8mKIR57oCjXru4Ju-VSDVP0jUO6FrMGoB-i-flchQAHpNzylZYIK3oIyOWoFazj35uiu3i9jn8mfzU9L1cfNpl1f_rXtSErfNmzHtwPth5XE7KapyCXfhuVjESekEWc2EhLyuJgEyDILZlHehwzijxyyhrsnQ6jUTBNW9-shaf5oH2bu8jpJepmZPCwXLuKbK3DsCER7U8e-Kb8POltb8T-OM0JML8SvPuTnTHI2qvZb6s6e4TtWF1dw7jr2iVCdiBT__ArzIjVHp3nn4Rn_0OL54SMQMsCy9HAcUdFyfK67GL7wmfFH0DOQWnYE6ZoawN-X6ffiDg6wnD44_NwlV-NS48k8Q7_1kTw==&c=f_rrXLUNQnkG5Y1paEATsxpLNooSVSEPZ3MT5HcScbF82BYRDmuImw==&ch=kYrjAy3glk2a26RZ1xluR4G_FEwii4X3QoHcB86afIed2tmFEu2Q5Q==)**
As your next Governor, I will always stand by our brave men and women in law enforcement and ensure we are protecting them from the radical east coast elitists who want to defund them.

I look forward to working alongside law enforcement and creating a safe and lawful environment for the people of Arkansas.[**I hope you 'll join me in these efforts.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L8w6mRZ4o44OGzQXsVdY7fsdTeN4WH9YaUkOwr3wOufHfuGURA03IW22CxUVYf_Ga8zbv9Ot2OOOaZQf8pK8mKIR57oCjXru4Ju-VSDVP0jUO6FrMGoB-i-flchQAHpNzylZYIK3oIyOWoFazj35uiu3i9jn8mfzU9L1cfNpl1f_rXtSErfNmzHtwPth5XE7KapyCXfhuVjESekEWc2EhLyuJgEyDILZlHehwzijxyyhrsnQ6jUTBNW9-shaf5oH2bu8jpJepmZPCwXLuKbK3DsCER7U8e-Kb8POltb8T-OM0JML8SvPuTnTHI2qvZb6s6e4TtWF1dw7jr2iVCdiBT__ArzIjVHp3nn4Rn_0OL54SMQMsCy9HAcUdFyfK67GL7wmfFH0DOQWnYE6ZoawN-X6ffiDg6wnD44_NwlV-NS48k8Q7_1kTw==&c=f_rrXLUNQnkG5Y1paEATsxpLNooSVSEPZ3MT5HcScbF82BYRDmuImw==&ch=kYrjAy3glk2a26RZ1xluR4G_FEwii4X3QoHcB86afIed2tmFEu2Q5Q==)
**[SUPPORT LAW ENFORCEMENT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L8w6mRZ4o44OGzQXsVdY7fsdTeN4WH9YaUkOwr3wOufHfuGURA03IW22CxUVYf_Ga8zbv9Ot2OOOaZQf8pK8mKIR57oCjXru4Ju-VSDVP0jUO6FrMGoB-i-flchQAHpNzylZYIK3oIyOWoFazj35uiu3i9jn8mfzU9L1cfNpl1f_rXtSErfNmzHtwPth5XE7KapyCXfhuVjESekEWc2EhLyuJgEyDILZlHehwzijxyyhrsnQ6jUTBNW9-shaf5oH2bu8jpJepmZPCwXLuKbK3DsCER7U8e-Kb8POltb8T-OM0JML8SvPuTnTHI2qvZb6s6e4TtWF1dw7jr2iVCdiBT__ArzIjVHp3nn4Rn_0OL54SMQMsCy9HAcUdFyfK67GL7wmfFH0DOQWnYE6ZoawN-X6ffiDg6wnD44_NwlV-NS48k8Q7_1kTw==&c=f_rrXLUNQnkG5Y1paEATsxpLNooSVSEPZ3MT5HcScbF82BYRDmuImw==&ch=kYrjAy3glk2a26RZ1xluR4G_FEwii4X3QoHcB86afIed2tmFEu2Q5Q==)**

Thank you,

Leslie Rutledge

body:
Iowa is coming back and we're coming back strong.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VTmo3aIQDSbdN8U9-1R0svzWgdu4Udovs2I_knISTavqTvT5_YUsJ4Fsxb3R5zZ2idvf54Uav7EyyOIvFeapJZlRKgiJtUoI-GBZfKmzG2YmLk0ng1Yt-2M-Yl5fRso8nEgy4uLwEf_kOIF0yg6kyYVvHoZ087l5NM3wl5j4sVykSlpsxopgdiXyOoMrLY4SBhSZOa4GWzENyn2sQzZEsuBcrMdKd58b2wWqeVboiD2tf4znbzowSYxcaDbMw0aH8IiXX8ouXcPO9HHjYRIsl79VYaLt4eZO7iEsKIzzkgrUkB4rjqplV2KaT7-3rN6OVUpz6p8yxeQFiPkm8-bLOxcJIuI8DOwrtdSB69rW-TYGPD7eMhG91LsN_nYcq-qur3cGGZhZqSkChDEgUQFYKg1ggKkcGvxfFgtKbrqYx39M5_YitRK3Y4jTMrWqHfnktNyf_GcsxnM=&c=-3-K-WY4T0Sj9374rTKYuKUjwxtlcV6ims1gF4NIiSb6tEywg18mfw==&ch=vd_s26VskU-N_W3a7G_4adQheV5dlIuxOTLPAQIc0h-nC3OQqmCWbQ==)
[_**Have you responded to our survey yet, Friend?** _](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VTmo3aIQDSbdN8U9-1R0svzWgdu4Udovs2I_knISTavqTvT5_YUsJ4Fsxb3R5zZ2idvf54Uav7EyyOIvFeapJZlRKgiJtUoI-GBZfKmzG2YmLk0ng1Yt-2M-Yl5fRso8nEgy4uLwEf_kOIF0yg6kyYVvHoZ087l5NM3wl5j4sVykSlpsxopgdiXyOoMrLY4SBhSZOa4GWzENyn2sQzZEsuBcrMdKd58b2wWqeVboiD2tf4znbzowSYxcaDbMw0aH8IiXX8ouXcPO9HHjYRIsl79VYaLt4eZO7iEsKIzzkgrUkB4rjqplV2KaT7-3rN6OVUpz6p8yxeQFiPkm8-bLOxcJIuI8DOwrtdSB69rW-TYGPD7eMhG91LsN_nYcq-qur3cGGZhZqSkChDEgUQFYKg1ggKkcGvxfFgtKbrqYx39M5_YitRK3Y4jTMrWqHfnktNyf_GcsxnM=&c=-3-K-WY4T0Sj9374rTKYuKUjwxtlcV6ims1gF4NIiSb6tEywg18mfw==&ch=vd_s26VskU-N_W3a7G_4adQheV5dlIuxOTLPAQIc0h-nC3OQqmCWbQ==)
---
**[**TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VTmo3aIQDSbdN8U9-1R0svzWgdu4Udovs2I_knISTavqTvT5_YUsJ4Fsxb3R5zZ2idvf54Uav7EyyOIvFeapJZlRKgiJtUoI-GBZfKmzG2YmLk0ng1Yt-2M-Yl5fRso8nEgy4uLwEf_kOIF0yg6kyYVvHoZ087l5NM3wl5j4sVykSlpsxopgdiXyOoMrLY4SBhSZOa4GWzENyn2sQzZEsuBcrMdKd58b2wWqeVboiD2tf4znbzowSYxcaDbMw0aH8IiXX8ouXcPO9HHjYRIsl79VYaLt4eZO7iEsKIzzkgrUkB4rjqplV2KaT7-3rN6OVUpz6p8yxeQFiPkm8-bLOxcJIuI8DOwrtdSB69rW-TYGPD7eMhG91LsN_nYcq-qur3cGGZhZqSkChDEgUQFYKg1ggKkcGvxfFgtKbrqYx39M5_YitRK3Y4jTMrWqHfnktNyf_GcsxnM=&c=-3-K-WY4T0Sj9374rTKYuKUjwxtlcV6ims1gF4NIiSb6tEywg18mfw==&ch=vd_s26VskU-N_W3a7G_4adQheV5dlIuxOTLPAQIc0h-nC3OQqmCWbQ==)**

clean_body: Pelosi's candidate is already organizing against, determined to do whatever it takes to flip this seat back to blue. ** . == FIRST: Nancy Pelosi and the Far-Left spent $11 million against us. THEN: Our opponent declared a rematch race for 2022. NOW: Pelosi's candidate is already organizing against us, determined to do whatever it takes to flip this seat back to blue. Friend, Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are determined to win back every seat they lost in November, including ours, to ensure their socialist agenda remains intact. == As California's taxpayer champion, she's enacted quick, common-sense reform and returned over $400 million to California taxpayers. She's pledged to vote against all tax increases and stop any new taxes. In Washington, Michelle will continue to work to support hardworking Americans and taxpayers everywhere --but right now she needs your help! == | ==** == The Democrats control the House, Senate, and White House -- and now they can push through their Far Left agenda unfettered! We have to win back the House for Republicans to put an end to the madness. So, today we're counting on you. We only have to win FIVE MORE SEATS.== Thank you, Steph Team Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

subject: 50 years in Washington, Still an Amateur
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Whenever I get a glimpse of national news I become even more thankful that, because of the hard work we’ve all contributed to...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470226?e=1acd9bb3d6)
50 years in Washington, Still an Amateur
Whenever I get a glimpse of national news I become even more thankful that, because of the hard work we’ve all contributed to over the last several years, Indiana is led by Republicans like Governor Holcomb, our legislative supermajorities and conservative leaders from the courthouse to the statehouse throughout Indiana. Roughly a month into the current legislative session and we’re seeing progress being made on important issues. And, while session is progressing, Indiana continues to vaccinate Hoosiers and is best in the Midwest and one of the top states in the country. The cold weather isn’t slowing down our infrastructure projects either and jobs keep coming to Indiana at an impressive rate. Compare that record of good governance to what we’re seeing from the liberal takeover of Washington DC.

The first few weeks of Joe Biden’s presidency are off to a rough start. The new president’s first actions were to kill union jobs, raise gas prices, weaken our southern border, and turn over American energy independence to international “accords.” An administration that claimed it would be ready on day one, is stumbling out of the gate. An administration that claimed they respected science and doctors is openly contradicting the head of the CDC on school openings and Dr. Anthony Fauci on vaccine planning. It’s amateur hour in the White House, which is surprising when you consider Biden has been in DC since the Nixon administration.

As for the farce of an impeachment trial going on now in the Senate, you can read my thoughts on it by clicking here (http://indiana.gop/news/chairman-hupfer-statement-impeachment-trial?fbclid=IwAR1VeygFqvYS9lYSeYR5NJCKuwFbn6TWCW76EAXjJLCSil_TBEwqKbLm8wQ&mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

Thank you,
Kyle

Photo: Chairman Hupfer participating in one of the many Zooms and videos he does each week.
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Building One Indiana for All

This week, Governor Holcomb announced a new initiative to continue his fight against the drug epidemic. The governor’s new program expands access to the opioid reversal agent naloxone through the purchase of 24/7-access to “NaloxBox” units. These boxes are just one innovative strategy the governor is deploying to continue fighting back against the opioid crisis that has claimed too many Hoosier lives.

Governor Holcomb also announced his office is now accepting applications for the Governor’s Fellowship program (https://www.in.gov/gov/governors-office/governors-fellowship-program/?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID) . This is a great opportunity for new college graduates to gain valuable experience across multiple state agencies. More information on the program and how to apply is listed below. If you know some good college graduates that should participate in this program, send them the information (https://www.in.gov/gov/governors-office/governors-fellowship-program/?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID) !

And finally, Governor Holcomb joined all Hoosiers in mourning the death of former Indiana First Lady Susan Bayh. The governor’s full statement (https://events.in.gov/event/gov_holcomb_statement_on_susan_bayh?utm_campaign=widget&utm_medium=widget&utm_source=State+of+Indiana&mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID) on Susan Bayh’s passing is below.

To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c97eaa2a82&e=bd22884127&mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID) , Twitter (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5288cdf6c3&e=bd22884127&mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID) , and Instagram (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a64dd61359&e=bd22884127&mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID) !

Naloxone Kits Available in All 92 Counties

Governor Holcomb and the Indiana Family and Social Services Administration’s Division of Mental Health and Addiction today announced the state will partner with Overdose Lifeline, Inc. to expand access to the opioid reversal agent naloxone through the purchase of 24/7-access “NaloxBox” units. These Naloxone kits will be available in all 92 counties and will save countless Hoosier lives in our continued fight against the opioid epidemic.

“Making overdose response tools like naloxone readily available to any Hoosier who may encounter an individual suffering from an overdose is critical in addressing the drug epidemic. We’re committed to raising awareness about the need for bystanders to carry this lifesaving drug, which is why we’ve made it available via so many avenues, oftentimes at no cost to Hoosiers.” -Governor Holcomb

Governor Holcomb's Statement on Susan Bayh

Governor Holcomb gave the following statement on the passing of former First Lady Susan Bayh:

“Janet and I were saddened to learn about the passing of former First Lady Susan Bayh. She was an extraordinary and radiant public servant, wife, mother and friend, who leaves a remarkable impact on our state and nation. I ask all Hoosiers to join us in praying and being there for the Bayh family.” -Governor Holcomb

COVID-19 Vaccine Update

Thanks to Governor Holcomb's leadership, Indiana continues to set the bar and lead the way with COVID-19 vaccines. 10.7% of all Hoosiers have received at least the first dose of the vaccine. Not only is Indiana getting vaccines distributed quickly, but now Hoosiers 65+ can schedule to get vaccinated.

--> Click here for information on the COVID-19 vaccine in Indiana <-- (http://ourshot.in.gov/?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)

Governor's Fellow Applications Now Open

Applications are now open for the Governor’s Fellowship Program (https://www.in.gov/gov/governors-office/governors-fellowship-program/?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID) ! This full-time, paid opportunity provides young men & women firsthand experience in a variety of state government roles. Governor’s Fellows work in a variety of settings. Many of those who have participated as Governor’s Fellows over the past two decades have gone on to successful careers in both the public and private sector. If you know someone who would be interested in this opportunity, make sure to share this information.

--> For more information and to apply, click here <-- (https://www.in.gov/gov/governors-office/governors-fellowship-program/?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)

Lt. Gov. Receives COVID-19 Vaccine

Great news! Lieutenant Governor Suzanne Crouch has received her first dose of the Pfizer COVID-19 vaccine in her hometown of Evansville.

“So that is why the priority and focus has been on those elderly Hoosiers, to be able to ensure we have the ICU beds available to treat sick Hoosiers, but also to be able to save lives.” -Lieutenant Governor Crouch

Chairman Hupfer on Fort Wayne's Morning News

Chairman Kyle Hupfer had the chance to speak with WOWO’s Kayla Blakeslee last week about the 2021 plans for the Indiana GOP. You can listen to that interview here. (https://www.wowo.com/indiana-gop-chairman-lays-out-2021-plans/?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)

News You Can Use

Governor Eric Holcomb announces 24/7 naloxone initiative (https://www.whas11.com/article/news/local/gov-holcomb-announces-initiative-to-place-overdose-reversal-kits-in-all-92-counties/417-c29e54d7-a9e7-4876-8055-9eeefb14df3b?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch receives COVID-19 vaccine (https://www.14news.com/2021/02/06/lt-gov-crouch-gets-covid-vaccine-evansville/?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Senator Todd Young's stimulus amendment approved with bi-partisan support (http://kokomoperspective.com/politics/indiana/feb-10---indiana-sen-todd-youngs-stimulus-amendment-approved-with-bipartisan-support/article_e3c1215d-0509-5750-828b-fed1e938faa1.html?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Senator Mike Braun's amendment to prevent the Biden administration from banning fracking passes (https://www.braun.senate.gov/senate-passes-braun-amendment-prevent-biden-administration-banning-fracking?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Congresswoman Jackie Walorski cosponsers bill to save Keystone Pipeline jobs (https://www.facebook.com/RepJackieWalorski/posts/4357117021013721?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Congressman Jim Banks selected as Ranking Member of the House Armed Services Subcommittee (http://www.wbiw.com/2021/02/05/rep-banks-selected-as-ranking-member-of-hasc-subcommittee-on-military-personnel/?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Congressman Jim Baird appointed as top Republican on Agriculture subcommittee (https://baird.house.gov/news/documentsingle.aspx?DocumentID=135&fbclid=IwAR1OAfOGcAL3fPbC2845CuOVxDqRpmvcoLNAfRlkDeRH8_0Fn-ehw63tLkU&mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Congresswoman Victoria Spartz selected to serve on 2 House committees (https://www.heraldbulletin.com/news/local_news/spartz-gets-2-house-committee-assignments/article_63f184da-6193-11eb-b8be-1b9b17452fc2.html?mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Congressman Greg Pence's Cyber Pilot Program Signed into Law (https://pence.house.gov/media/press-releases/greg-pence-cyber-pilot-program-signed-law-discusses-future-cybertropolis?fbclid=IwAR3I4ZtuFx7TlVk7511onx-HuN1_nbCIecOUUL7HWvmCOisORiw06HjWh88&mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Congressman Larry Bucshon releases statement on House Dem's budget resolution (https://bucshon.house.gov/news/documentsingle.aspx?DocumentID=4062&fbclid=IwAR1ttA_E7QeiO5KFpHsHGnqO5RyoMyFnhQD7BwmD0-82fC26CAVlJuOcBWU&mc_cid=23a04b8912&mc_eid=UNIQID)

name: Governor Stitt
subject: What we have accomplished for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STITT FOR GOVERNOR 2022
body:
%%First Name%%, as you know, Oklahoma is on the right track to become a Top Ten state in so many ways. While this past year has undoubtedly been challenging, I wanted to take a quick moment to share some highlights with you.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IO-OmP0mzomkSlzta4Pmr-nqixq6cwr6iwgLK-8gB4QfRd9TyPTjigPebvXLPWMky9agVxn71Grmm3xLBviXPD9_XDAJ41ciVZm4cZDsNCQ5bev91AXdusvsa4c65jFSEBptxFz-Wux89xF4zm1B17dr3L_Vv6UhEmv1zoAxXp4_7_B6YJ3-D_2kGP3K7YdAjenn8P5bMpQyPw5su3xaXle-OYoxcKo-i9qOj31GUVMSGArB1PYjvu7XX278M1TkfpBw_4wYLIin1EwqgBwV54UxHk6b8gB6dQIayiddtdsvhrWu5A6NXQDlaeboTqADWfUmmBIvBe1D_STsfktT1XKkpUGshYXJpitKW9DWI9psrAgGBxCNE_QnztZJfSJiHZiGzo8D_pi-UThBLz-Abg==&c=7D8OGSsfpTk3IGWP_7H260GDn2fPgjxwX7gfG9VfUtxomN5lnJ1X0Q==&ch=OwbT-k6AuX-0ewhWsrY5OQ-PKjuBkusSwKBd2HiCo4xraVrri4wB1A==)
Friend, as you know, Oklahoma is on the right track to become a Top Ten state in so many ways. While this past year has undoubtedly been challenging, I wanted to take a quick moment to share some highlights with you. _Thanks to our conservative approach, this past year, Oklahoma:_
✔️ Mobilized millions of COVID-19 tests and led the way in vaccine distribution
✔️ Put OK students and families first by moving to safely open our schools
✔️ Prioritized re-opening our economy and supported small businesses
✔️ Increased education resources to give teachers flexibility and to give students option
✔️ And so much more In my time as Governor, I am proud of what our state has been able to accomplish. I am committed to continuing to deliver for Oklahomans by supporting our oil & gas industry, keeping taxes low, improving our job market, and advancing our schools. [_**Can I count on your support today?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IO-OmP0mzomkSlzta4Pmr-nqixq6cwr6iwgLK-8gB4QfRd9TyPTjigPebvXLPWMky9agVxn71Grmm3xLBviXPD9_XDAJ41ciVZm4cZDsNCQ5bev91AXdusvsa4c65jFSEBptxFz-Wux89xF4zm1B17dr3L_Vv6UhEmv1zoAxXp4_7_B6YJ3-D_2kGP3K7YdAjenn8P5bMpQyPw5su3xaXle-OYoxcKo-i9qOj31GUVMSGArB1PYjvu7XX278M1TkfpBw_4wYLIin1EwqgBwV54UxHk6b8gB6dQIayiddtdsvhrWu5A6NXQDlaeboTqADWfUmmBIvBe1D_STsfktT1XKkpUGshYXJpitKW9DWI9psrAgGBxCNE_QnztZJfSJiHZiGzo8D_pi-UThBLz-Abg==&c=7D8OGSsfpTk3IGWP_7H260GDn2fPgjxwX7gfG9VfUtxomN5lnJ1X0Q==&ch=OwbT-k6AuX-0ewhWsrY5OQ-PKjuBkusSwKBd2HiCo4xraVrri4wB1A==) name: Rainee Taylor, Evergreen Action
subject: The #1 policy we're pushing for right now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We're carrying the Inslee campaign's legacy forward.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=3&akid=6645%2E53494%2ELAAJjh) Friend, I'm not a policy ~~expert~~ nerd like some of my friends and colleagues here at Evergreen. I don't stay up until 2 or 3 in the morning, writing about RPS (renewable portfolio standards), the IPCC (Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change), or ZECs (zero-emissions electricity credits). But this is very clear: A federal clean electricity standard (CES) would transform the U.S. power grid to run entirely on clean, carbon-free electricity by 2035—and put thousands of people in communities across America to work in good-paying jobs. The CES was a crucial piece of Jay Inslee's climate agenda during his climate-centered presidential campaign. We were thrilled when Biden took it up as part of his climate plan. And carrying the torch forward, Evergreen knows how central it must be to this new administration. That's why we recently released a 56-page roadmap the Democrats can use to pass a CES _(with or without Republican support)_. That's why it's the number-one policy that Evergreen is pushing for right now. **And that's why the Gov, my old boss, has shared emphatic support for our roadmap:** [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2104?t=4&akid=6645%2E53494%2ELAAJjh) We're thrilled by the support our report has attracted, from policymakers to climate activists, online and offline. The American electorate doesn't care about praise alone, though. They want to see the Biden-Harris administration and the Democratic leaders in Congress press ahead with 100% clean electricity. Now that our report is out in the world, our next job is to spread it far and wide so it gets put into action. **[We're close to making a 100% federal clean electricity standard a reality, but we need your support to keep raising the volume. Donate to Evergreen today to help finish the fight—from Jay and onward—for a federal clean electricity standard.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2104?t=5&akid=6645%2E53494%2ELAAJjh)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2139?t=6&akid=6645%2E53494%2ELAAJjh)

clean_body: We're carrying the Inslee campaign's legacy forward. | Friend, I'm not a policy ~~expert~~ nerd like some of my friends and colleagues here at Evergreen. I don't stay up until 2 or 3 in the morning, writing about RPS (renewable portfolio standards), the IPCC (Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change), or ZECs (zero-emissions electricity credits). But this is very clear: A federal clean electricity standard (CES) would transform the U.S. power grid to run entirely on clean, carbon-free electricity by 2035—and put thousands of people in communities across America to work in good-paying jobs. The CES was a crucial piece of Jay Inslee's climate agenda during his climate-centered presidential campaign. We were thrilled when Biden took it up as part of his climate plan. And carrying the torch forward, Evergreen knows how central it must be to this new administration. That's why we recently released a 56-page roadmap the Democrats can use to pass a CES (with or without Republican support). That's why it's the number-one policy that Evergreen is pushing for right now. And that's why the Gov, my old boss, has shared emphatic support for our roadmap: We're thrilled by the support our report has attracted, from policymakers to climate activists, online and offline. The American electorate doesn't care about praise alone, though. They want to see the Biden-Harris administration and the Democratic leaders in Congress press ahead with 100% clean electricity. Now that our report is out in the world, our next job is to spread it far and wide so it gets put into action. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Rainee Taylor Digital Advisor, Evergreen Action

name: Team Cammack
subject: More Division at the Capitol
body:
Impeachment again?
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LZrZJ5tL7bp9LOJBSSZk-L3-Fe-0gsRpBbH_tKat70OtfPwrP_WNjlOruxRrrMPaOdj_yPsokoNnvlHDhJzb_pyeQcuBThFHteC2igNw0FcjO1UQhb6qMBrm2ZN96Vh0hTGJQA_Y9Ela0SeHCPJZJjiuWwhDWq1TthM3WT2FdiHDCHz6BhZsDU4uk7VEYkUK&c=4emjXklO__xVmEK562rHUec5N4l9o6zmENh87MHVJzaalG4FhTQm6w==&ch=sXcgOgda8NDh2Ifi-PcjeugY9XsGiqkj_GJ1UmMw_6LgER_rsYL-Tw==)
---
| Patriot,
Congress needs to focus on working for the American people, not some politically-driven impeachment trial that's doing more to divide our country than unite it. The people of North Central Florida deserve better.
This impeachment trial is not what America needs. Now is our chance to unite as a country and respond to the very real needs of the American people, not impeach a private citizen after he's already left office.
Watch the video below to see Kat speaking on this issue:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LZrZJ5tL7bp9LOJBSSZk-L3-Fe-0gsRpBbH_tKat70OtfPwrP_WNjlOruxRrrMPaOdj_yPsokoNnvlHDhJzb_pyeQcuBThFHteC2igNw0FcjO1UQhb6qMBrm2ZN96Vh0hTGJQA_Y9Ela0SeHCPJZJjiuWwhDWq1TthM3WT2FdiHDCHz6BhZsDU4uk7VEYkUK&c=4emjXklO__xVmEK562rHUec5N4l9o6zmENh87MHVJzaalG4FhTQm6w==&ch=sXcgOgda8NDh2Ifi-PcjeugY9XsGiqkj_GJ1UmMw_6LgER_rsYL-Tw==)
---
| | | [HELP KAT KEEP CONGRESS FOCUSED](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LZrZJ5tL7bp9LOJBSSZk-L3-Fe-0gsRpBbH_tKat70OtfPwrP_WNjlOruxRrrMPaOdj_yPsokoNnvlHDhJzb_pyeQcuBThFHteC2igNw0FcjO1UQhb6qMBrm2ZN96Vh0hTGJQA_Y9Ela0SeHCPJZJjiuWwhDWq1TthM3WT2FdiHDCHz6BhZsDU4uk7VEYkUK&c=4emjXklO__xVmEK562rHUec5N4l9o6zmENh87MHVJzaalG4FhTQm6w==&ch=sXcgOgda8NDh2Ifi-PcjeugY9XsGiqkj_GJ1UmMw_6LgER_rsYL-Tw==)
---
| In Kat's own words:
"We need to get busy working on the things our constituents sent us to Washington to do. We know this is pure politics at its finest. What's next? Are we going to impeach former presidents because their values are no longer in vogue? This sets a very dangerous precedent. We need to be focused on the things that are actually affecting our constituents every day. Not this sham impeachment the Democrats are trying to ram through."
Congress needs to get with the program and focus on what's important. Impeaching a private citizen during a pandemic is nothing but political theater. [Can Kat count on your support?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LZrZJ5tL7bp9LOJBSSZk-L3-Fe-0gsRpBbH_tKat70OtfPwrP_WNjlOruxRrrMPaOdj_yPsokoNnvlHDhJzb_pyeQcuBThFHteC2igNw0FcjO1UQhb6qMBrm2ZN96Vh0hTGJQA_Y9Ela0SeHCPJZJjiuWwhDWq1TthM3WT2FdiHDCHz6BhZsDU4uk7VEYkUK&c=4emjXklO__xVmEK562rHUec5N4l9o6zmENh87MHVJzaalG4FhTQm6w==&ch=sXcgOgda8NDh2Ifi-PcjeugY9XsGiqkj_GJ1UmMw_6LgER_rsYL-Tw==)

clean_body: Impeachment again? | | | | | | == | Patriot, Congress needs to focus on working for the American people, not some politically-driven impeachment trial that's doing more to divide our country than unite it. The people of North Central Florida deserve better. This impeachment trial is not what America needs. Now is our chance to unite as a country and respond to the very real needs of the American people, not impeach a private citizen after he's already left office. Watch the video below to see Kat speaking on this issue: | == | | | == | In Kat's own words: "We need to get busy working on the things our constituents sent us to Washington to do. We know this is pure politics at its finest. What's next? Are we going to impeach former presidents because their values are no longer in vogue? This sets a very dangerous precedent. We need to be focused on the things that are actually affecting our constituents every day. Not this sham impeachment the Democrats are trying to ram through." Congress needs to get with the program and focus on what's important. Impeaching a private citizen during a pandemic is nothing but political theater. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thanks for continuing to support Kat as she makes our voices heard in Congress. For Florida, Team Cammack | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

body:

Friend, don't leave this unread. The Democrats are already organizing to unseat immigrant and proud conservative, Young Kim. In fact, they raised $200,000.00 in just 24 hours to do just that.

To make matters worse, the DCCC launched a major campaign against me and other top-targeted conservatives -- and put $500,000.00 behind it.

**And this is only the beginning, Friend.[Can Young and I count on you to chip in $10 to help us defend CA-39 and win back the House for Republicans? We're only FIVE SEATS away from restoring a common-sense agenda to Washington.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j3QBcAwzpk2rEiRn3CkAGA-guXg6tWtMVxqNdvlQcOmq7KwiNQHJA5gSrQ2ZZfnJCMZTX5h35kMnFZ1ZyBQUwPeRqdumwS0QR9mdAau0s2Dt_VnD8VXx5RWvhoJ34uYZJNfnGc0vF-G74P-PJkugDb7c0XQ7ZfWRNy3zPaPTIlYC2KZKMaHqqguZanYfoFcH_Uh8fJlGsEaSDY5xirDRIqsxbE-y1N-rhIPOEhwYo91lpgIhaNot90IfO-T2VNMc6SolxzhzTH0CBwK_gg2YryefZ4_O6Jwgb3p-ZlSYGwTRZ12czocSfR9Cq4glojJ92WVfNl5tVZsJf68ly-8r0Siy0bVQiNEf6t_YBqPc5cmiiDYy4m4NRQeiYmMyH30-IAWmXyq0tb3yt6eJz2rp_LdTLFwq_5A-2VZC5tDuDwVFugXUsAnmSqD-zO3PHJBevx1BBU7OJos=&c=3Q8aemSD8bUfZzGSdN4Pc5IAuWVBVvOslu8irq9ClQAnArYKrITqaw==&ch=iKr3UR1DpgRyl8lH_1tZThB8JTtMny0cUeuKmcdOWP7jhcYUfP7q7A==)**

Friend, I want to make myself clear: the House Majority hinges on this seat. clean_body: Making sure you saw the latest poll Derek, I wanted to make sure you saw Chairman Stepanek’s email from yesterday and just reiterate to all of you: in 2022 we are going to Retire Maggie Hassan, but only if we can count on your support. We’re going to see one of the most expensive campaigns of the 2022 cycle right here in New Hampshire, and the race against Maggie Hassan will be the marquee U.S. Senate race in the country. Control of the United States Senate comes down to New Hampshire. In order to ensure Republicans can win in 2022 and flip control of the United States Senate, we need to be aggressive. Help us reach our goal by donating here: Consider making this a recurring, monthly contribution so that we can have the strongest state party to support our eventual U.S. Senate nominee, and I know our party is going to nominate a strong candidate who believes in the New Hampshire Advantage and will defeat Maggie Hassan at the ballot box. New Hampshire voters are all about results, and the results speak for themselves: Maggie Hassan has failed us in the U.S. Senate and Granite Staters will replace her in 2022 - 47% of New Hampshire voters already want to! Please consider making a contribution to support our efforts today: Regards, Joe \- - - BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE From: Chairman Stephen Stepanek Date : February 11, 2021 at 8:06:25 AM EST To: Concerned Voters Subject: 🚨 POLL ALERT: Maggie Hassan 🚨 Derek, In 2022, all eyes will be on New Hampshire: Control of the U.S. Senate is up for grabs right here in the Granite State. In that effort we have some good news: Saint Anselm just released a poll that shows only 39% of New Hampshire wants to reelect Maggie Hassan. What’s more is that 47% of New Hampshire voters are already looking to replace Senator Hassan with someone who will protect and defend the NH Advantage. As she continues to serve as the deciding vote in the U.S. Senate, expect that number to increase. Senator Maggie Hassan can decide to vote with the people of New Hampshire or she can vote in lockstep and join Vice President Kamala Harris in rubber stamping the Democrat's agenda. New Hampshire is one of our best shots at taking back control of the U.S. Senate in 2022 , but we need your help in order to do so. The 2022 U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire could be one of the most expensive in our nation's history and The path to a new Republican Majority in the Senate runs right through New Hampshire in 2022 -**** \- NHGOPChairman Stephen Stepanek SECURE DONOR BOX Derek, can we count on you to donate whatever you can today to help retire Maggie Hassan and flip the United States Senate to Republican control in 2022? | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 |

body:
We have created the Finish the Wall Task Force to ensure that the wall is not abandoned!

Fellow Conservative,

One of Trump's biggest accomplishments as President was the building of a wall along our southern border, but now the Biden Administration is shutting the construction of the wall down!

[**FINISH THE WALL!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00165z31aCVcpSdzTypnfkZsUfpiZ9tg5MDZE2rnC8lVprSFZgr0RkmVhPRsLg0tUxw81selI6g6bMY9g7RJhCIwEwe5pEGUV1TBTdfSko_Lf47vPXMQhudRAj3YvYEiBr1j_d4G_aVdXsjs5xYGXhUS4AwSBhuFI-r--tVHkdTKnBfXEIQqR5wXxTrlxq4RqwxLBsYLNxB0tKLfTJ8Uz4LohpgA5UPGVGT6De4bQzX_rXJe_MGLR4bhMwADqXE9zxmf1MSHkMLjofH6NFsDIzGay641I863rSfdt6nlTbgZpFD-Ay-X6PiX4mDOv1CBrxB8AevES06yiUqtoY45SpQKXEKp52SPqYz4vrbtD3bIQNe9gLtNhlDa1RYOMIhrUY3Poc6ZCrPos8isi0M2kQ6wn5kJrm6IwLI1WULcsV_46ejk033ATYxNDiDVPE_dLNJ&c=Jc9XYoyuzrkGVaaXHewWLIgFeuNeTvMsSXandVFcr8nOh5EIUa5y6g==&ch=gEcKyaILl3HqPu3UDGFYcQjQ_MVegHOuIDCrdhVszJMt4NFlGt_Bpg==)

Not only does this decision cause many hardworking Americans who were working on the construction of the wall to lose their jobs, but it also places all Americans and our borders in danger!

[**That is why we have created the Finish the Wall Task Force to ensure that the wall is not abandoned!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00165z31aCVcpSdzTypnfkZsUfpiZ9tg5MDZE2rnC8lVprSFZgr0RkmVhPRsLg0tUxw81selI6g6bMY9g7RJhCIwEwe5pEGUV1TBTdfSko_Lf47vPXMQhudRAj3YvYEiBr1j_d4G_aVdXsjs5xYGXhUS4AwSBhuFI-r--tVHkdTKnBfXEIQqR5wXxTrlxq4RqwxLBsYLNxB0tKLfTJ8Uz4LohpgA5UPGVGT6De4bQzX_rXJe_MGLR4bhMwADqXE9zxmf1MSHkMLjofH6NFsDIzGay641I863rSfdt6nlTbgZpFD-Ay-X6PiX4mDOv1CBrxB8AevES06yiUqtoY45SpQKXEKp52SPqYz4vrbtD3bIQNe9gLtNhlDa1RYOMIhrUY3Poc6ZCrPos8isi0M2kQ6wn5kJrm6IwLI1WULcsV_46ejk033ATYxNDiDVPE_dLNJ&c=Jc9XYoyuzrkGVaaXHewWLIgFeuNeTvMsSXandVFcr8nOh5EIUa5y6g==&ch=gEcKyaILl3HqPu3UDGFYcQjQ_MVegHOuIDCrdhVszJMt4NFlGt_Bpg==)

subject: Peter: Liftoff for the Defend America Initiative
body:
Republican Attorneys General are preparing to execute legal defenses to Biden overreach in 3... 2... 1... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0460db6e29d6/we-have-liftoff-670805?e=24057c0240)
---
|
---
|
---
Dear Peter,Attorney General Morrisey was recently a guest on Fox News to discuss how his office is planning to combat President Biden’s executive overreach.
[](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=9c4a1f5ab0&e=24057c0240)
A coalition of six states, led by Attorney General Patrick Morrisey, sent a letter to President Biden that warned of lawsuits if he attempts to violate individual rights, federal law, or the Constitution.President Biden’s unprecedented number of executive orders — 40 in the first week alone — has sparked confusion and fear among conservatives, moderates, and even some liberals."[B]y this letter we respectfully urge you when pursuing your policy priorities to honor the core constitutional tenets which should be appreciated and respected by every person entrusted with the honor and burdens of the presidency."[Click here to read the full letter.](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=869a5ddf25&e=24057c0240)
[](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=627c33f8a5&e=24057c0240)
Expect many more national news stories in the upcoming weeks as Attorney General Morrisey begins to initiate his plan to Defend America.

name: Moms in Office
subject: John Iadarola and Simona Grace
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24974732/272398849/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3NWIwNGUxLTk2NmQtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BSZiW1Ih63Ny3FGddUPj_6X_hXd-n7zQjbO243cVdkg=&emci=85481339-5d6d-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=175b04e1-966d-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131) **The Damage Report** "This is exactly the type of gendered language that we have been fighting against for 50 years." [ | | |
---|---|--- ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24974733/272398850/1700412333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3NWIwNGUxLTk2NmQtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BSZiW1Ih63Ny3FGddUPj_6X_hXd-n7zQjbO243cVdkg=&emci=85481339-5d6d-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=175b04e1-966d-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131)
Hi Peter,

Lawmakers across party lines can’t agree on putting money in the pockets of Americans facing hunger, poverty and eviction. A policy focused solely on compensating mothers will widen the divide across gender lines.

It is undeniable that working mothers are shouldering the brunt of the COVID-19 pandemic, but paying $2,400 to female caregivers only will hurt women in the long run.

We need inclusive economic policy solutions and we need public investment in job creation to lead us out of this recession.

**[24 million adults and 12 million children are going hungry in our country every day.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24974734/272398851/-1921557091?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3NWIwNGUxLTk2NmQtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BSZiW1Ih63Ny3FGddUPj_6X_hXd-n7zQjbO243cVdkg=&emci=85481339-5d6d-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&emdi=175b04e1-966d-eb11-9889-00155d43c992&ceid=2884131)**

We don't need a paid ad in The New York Times by 50 prominent women--we need a government responsive to the needs of the American people.

This is not the time for catchy headlines, this is the time for big, bold solutions that take into account the needs of all of those who are struggling.

Did you have a chance to catch me on the Damage Report? If not, please watch this video of me and John Iadarola discussing the need to get moms back to work.

With Gratitude,

Simona Grace
[**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24974735/272398852/-1644589594?refcode=0212&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3NWIwNGUxLTk2NmQtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BSZiW1Ih63Ny3FGddUPj_6X_hXd-n7zQjbO243cVdkg=)

Moms in Office
13351 Riverside Drive
#265
Sherman Oaks, CA 91423
United States

Peter, these actions are unspeakable and simply devastating for New York families.

**It is clear now that the Department of Justice must conduct a full investigation into the Cuomo Administration’s handling of nursing homes and COVID-19. **

Gov. Cuomo’s reckless actions not only put New York seniors in harm’s way, but he and his Administration admittedly hid the facts from the Department of Justice. His refusal to respect several Freedom of Information Law requests turned a misjudgment in policy into what very well may be one of the largest criminal cover-ups in New York’s history.

That’s why I’m officially calling for an investigation into Governor Andrew Cuomo’s actions regarding New York nursing homes and his decisions that followed. name: Team Ro
subject: It’s about more than an amount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
Working families are still feeling the financial effects from this pandemic. This movement was built by those very same working families, doing what they could to keep fighting for our progressive agenda through hard times. That’s why this weekend we refuse to ask you to donate an amount you can’t afford.
#
Working families are still feeling the financial effects from this pandemic.
This movement was built by those very same working families, doing what they could to keep fighting for our progressive agenda through hard times. That’s why this weekend we refuse to ask you to donate an amount you can’t afford.
In order to keep fighting for families like yours, we need to make sure we hit our mid month goal for February — but we aren’t focusing on an amount to raise. Instead, we want to see how many people can contribute to help build our movement, no matter how big or small.
**This movement is about doing what you can to fight for our values, and we know for some that could be contributing more or less right now.[So, will you give whatever you can afford, whether that be $5, $15, or $50, so we can hit our goal of 1,000 donations by midnight on February 15?](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5479?refcode=ema-1634&t=20&akid=1634%2E946728%2END7Mvj)**
**[Contribute](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5479?refcode=em-1634&amounts=&t=21&akid=1634%2E946728%2END7Mvj)**
We take $0 from PACs, including corporate PAC money — and that’s the path we intend on following. It allows Ro to focus on the needs of the people instead of special interests or corporations.
But, it makes fundraising a bit harder, especially when working families still have not received COVID-19 relief. We aren’t worried though. **Supporters like you have kept our fight alive for the things that matter for working people.**
Even a donation as small as $5 has a lot of power — because when you combine that with thousands of like minded allies nationwide, we can keep up our fight for our progressive ideals.
**[We know we can hit 1,000 contributions this weekend if we come together and do what we can for this movement, so please donate any amount you can afford today.](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5479?refcode=em-1634&t=22&akid=1634%2E946728%2END7Mvj)**
Thank you for your endless support,
Team Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-khanna?refcode=emfooter20210212&t=23&refcode2=1634_946728_ND7Mvj&akid=1634%2E946728%2END7Mvj)** | [](https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
---|---|---
Paid for by Ro for Congress
PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto:info@rokhanna.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we stay in touch with you, but if you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1634%2E946728%2END7Mvj).
